title: dryopteris confluens
intro: Dryopteris confluens is a species of fern, native to the mountainous regions of North America, belonging to the Dryopteris genus. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Dryopteris confluens are attributed to its ability to reduce inflammation, ease pain, and improve respiratory conditions. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal use, although further research is needed to fully understand its potential applications.
